changelog: Fixed: THM Tracker point count and progress bar now immediately update when you sync your profile from the View Profile tab — no more stale numbers after a sync.
Fixed: Points displayed during an active auto-answer session are now calculated from a frozen baseline captured at session start, preventing double-counting if a profile sync occurs mid-session.
Fixed: Skip This Version no longer blocks manual Check Update clicks — if you skipped a version, clicking Check Update will always show the update and let you install it.
